productDisplayName: Facit Men Mid- Rise BF Grey Briefs
description: Composition Pack of 2 briefs Grey melange jersey brief made of 100% premium cotton, has a wide comfortable elasticated waistband with an appliqued brand tab, high cut design and printed label on the inner Fitting Mid rise Wash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry cleanable This mid-rise brief from facit is crafted using pure cotton in a jersey knit that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch in ease. The wide fabric covered waistband offers a perfect Fit, while the printed label on the inside provides abrasion-free comfort.
